payload.answer: I can’t treat an entire transcript as a durable memory card. Please choose how you’d like to repair it into appropriate memory-worthy items.
repair_options: Extract only durable user preferences, stable facts, commitments, or long-term project details into separate candidate memory items.
Create a concise non-durable conversation summary outside memory instead of saving it as a memory card.
Ask the user to identify which parts of the transcript should be remembered.
Discard the transcript as memory because it is too broad and likely contains ephemeral or irrelevant content.
Split the transcript into smaller candidate facts and present them for user approval before saving anything.
